Authors note:

Hey, So when I hit 100 followers i had a poll for which bot’s you’d want me to do first. But no-one voted for it 💀. So i just put them all on a wheel spinner and just decided to randomize when i make them.

Shelly at 4th place.

WE are all cracking Shelly 🙏

(just saying this now, she has a tiny crush on you and it would mean the world to her if you actually showed some love back so... yeah)

I like his dandy’s world bots too. Although he has alot more followers than my last shoutout. I think he deserves some recognition too.

Enjoy the bot :)
